prs.title: docs: clarify `$derived` `await` behavior and dependency tracking
fix: prevent hydration error on async `{@html ...}`
docs: 'open in playground' links
chore: lots of async tests
Version Packages
fix: ensure HMR wrapper forwards correct start/end nodes to active effect
fix: export TweenOptions, SpringOptions, SpringUpdateOptions and Updater from svelte/motion
docs: recommend createContext as the primary method for context
Version Packages
fix: remove trailing semicolon from {@const} tag printer
fix: null out effect.b in destroy_effect to prevent memory leak
fix: group sync statements
fix: hydration comments during hmr
fix: properly invoke `iterator.return()` during reactivity loss check
fix: take event attributes into account when checking a11y
fix: defer batch resolution until earlier intersecting batches have committed
Version Packages
feat: allow `css`, `runes`, `customElement` compiler options to be functions
fix: reinstate reactivity loss tracking
Version Packages
fix: resume inert effects when they come from offscreen
fix: remove nodes in boundary when work is pending and HMR is active
fix: don't eagerly access not-yet-initialized functions in template
fix: ensure `$inspect` after top level await doesn't break builds
fix: ensure "is standalone child" is correctly reset
fix: discard batches made obsolete by commit
Version Packages
chore: add "untracked allows writes" test
fix: avoid traversing clean roots
fix: handle async RHS in assignment_value_stale
chore: add invariant utility
chore: add sandbox output files to .prettierignore
fix: keep select.__value current when effect is deferred
fix autofix
chore: add autofix workflow
fix: ensure deriveds values are correct across batches
fix:typo in best practices documentation
Version Packages
fix: resolve boundary in correct batch when hydrating
fix: recover from errors that leave a corrupted effect tree
fix: remove `untrack` circular dependency
fix: properly lazily evaluate RHS when checking for assignment_value_stale
chore: rebase batches after process, not during
Version Packages
fix: re-process batch if new root effects were scheduled
docs: fix usable spelling in migration guide
Version Packages
fix: better `bind:this` cleanup timing
Version Packages
docs: add skill true frontmatter
fix: don't access inert block effects
fix: set deferreds on initial suspense, too
chore: refactor scheduling
fix: handle asnyc updates within pending boundary
fix: clean up externally-added DOM nodes in {@html} on re-render
chore: deactivate batch after async derived resolves
perf: avoid re-traversing the effect tree after `$:` assignments
Revert "fix: skip derived re-evaluation inside inert effect blocks"
chore: robustify `flatten`
chore: tidy up
fix: skip derived re-evaluation inside inert effect blocks
Version Packages
fix: preserve original boundary errors when keyed each rows are removed during async updates
perf: optimize CSS selector pruning
perf: avoid O(n²) name scanning in scope generate/unique
chore: avoid reschedule during branch commit
chore: highlight effect in tree
fix: correctly add `__svelte_meta` after else-if chains
fix: preserve each items that are needed by pending batches
perf: cache element interactivity and source line splitting
chore: better log_effect_tree
fix: don't reset static elements with debug/snippets
fix: compare array contents for equality mismatch detections, not the arrays themselves
chore: add `batch.id` property
Version Packages
fix: SvelteURL search setter uses unnormalized value
docs: best practices
perf: optimize compiler analysis phase
fix: always case insensitive event handlers during ssr
fix: visit synthetic value node during ssr
chore: add funding manifest URL
fix: SvelteMap incorrectly handles keys with `undefined` values
chore: require pr number as input when manually invoking pkg.pr.new
chore: remove unused is_flushing variable
Fix #3555 ; scale elements in FLIP animations
fix: skip redundant batch.apply
perf: optimize parser hot paths for ~18% faster compilation
docs: fix list item
